name: mdma-session-guide
description: Privacy-first PWA companion for intentional MDMA experiences — guided meditations, journaling, phase-based session management, and post-session integration

scripts.dev:pages: npx browser-sync start --server --serveStatic public --index landing-page.html --extensions html --files '*.html, *.css, *.js' --port 5555 --no-open --no-notify
scripts.preview:full: npm run build && npx serve dist -p 5555
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && vite build && cp landing-page.html dist/index.html && cp about.html contribute.html faq.html privacy.html shared.css shared.js landing.css pages.css globe.js tree-draw-3d.js leaf-animation.js dist/ && cp public/og-image.png public/robots.txt public/sitemap.xml public/favicon-*.png public/apple-touch-icon.png public/site-icons.svg dist/ && node scripts/stamp-sitemap.mjs
